gaps.description: Process 'ALIGN' has no container directive. It cannot run portably on any WES-compliant cloud platform.
gaps.recommendation:
Add a container directive with a pinned image, e.g.:
    container 'quay.io/biocontainers/tool:1.0.0'

gaps.description: Process 'ALIGN' contains hardcoded absolute paths in its script block. These paths will not exist on cloud execution environments.
gaps.recommendation: Replace hardcoded paths with Nextflow input parameters. Reference files should be declared in the input: block and passed in via a params file or the workflow's input channel.

gaps.description: Process 'ALIGN' has no output declaration. Workflow engines cannot chain this process to downstream steps or track its results without explicit outputs.
gaps.recommendation:
Add an output: block declaring all files this process produces, e.g.:
    output:
        path "*.bam"
